metadata.title: Kokoro: The 8 Mandarin Voices
metadata.purpose: Language-roster reference cut in the Kokoro family: Bear's ElevenLabs clone introduces in English (B00, the only paid audio, honest about not speaking the language and about the pack's grades), then every voice speaks IN ITS OWN LANGUAGE — an in-language name line plus the localized house tagline, the constant sentence that makes the voices comparable. The group's best-graded voice closes. KokoroRosterCard renders every roster beat; per-voice YouTube chapter markers in the description. Localized lines are machine-authored — FACTCHECK verifies them at build and the description says so. Grades from hexgrad/Kokoro-82M VOICES.md 2026-07-13; ungraded voices stay ungraded. Rides outside the chapter order; cross-links the whole Kokoro roster family.
metadata.clock: narration — the master clock; every beat conforms to its measured audio (any engine)
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

checklist: the Mandarin 8 roster, in a row
the pack's own grades, spoken straight
same house line from every voice

beats.narration_text: My clone again — in English, because I don't speak Mandarin, and that's part of the point. If you're thinking of using the free engine for Mandarin narration, here are all eight voices. One honest thing first: the pack grades every one of these a D — its own report card, its own words, non-English support is thinner. You should hear what a D sounds like before you build with it. Each voice says its name and the house line: the machine brings the hands — you bring the taste. Cast by ear.

props.name: Xiaobei
props.subtitle: 我是小北，普通话女声。机器带来双手，品味由你决定。
props.subtitleEn: I'm Xiaobei, Mandarin female. The machine brings the hands — you bring the taste.

beats.narration_text: 我是小北，普通话女声。 机器带来双手，品味由你决定。
